document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

permitted_uses.use_name: Food stores Service and personal service shops
Theatres and cinemas, except drive-in theatres
Welding, plumbing and heating, electrical and other special trade contracting services and shops
Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22)

Commercial Entertainment Uses in conjunction with Full Service Restaurants, not exceeding 139 square metres (1,500 square feet) devoted to public use, and only on the sites identified in this Part. (RC-Apr 26/16;E-Jun 25/16)

provisions.text: C-2 ZONE REQUIREMENTS No development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following: Minimum Lot Area 29,064 square feet (2700 m2) Minimum Frontage 100 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m)

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: PARKING AND OUTDOOR DISPLAY

provisions.text: No open storage or outdoor display shall be permitted.

The parking lot shall be demarcated and paved or otherwise maintained with a stable

OTHER REQUIREMENTS: ABUTTING USES Notwithstanding the provisions of Section 16.2, where any commercial use abuts another commercial or an industrial use, the abutting side or rear yard requirement may be reduced to eight (8) feet.

OTHER REQUIREMENTS: COMMERCIAL FLOOR AREA The gross floor area of all commercial buildings on a lot in any C-2 Zone shall not exceed five thousand (5000) square feet of gross floor area, including any floor area devoted to permitted dwelling units.
OTHER REQUIREMENTS: INSTITUTIONAL USES Where institutional uses are permitted ln any C -2 Zone, the provisions of Part 22 shall apply.

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: COMMERCIAL ENTERTAINMENT USES IN

provisions.text: OTHER REQUIREMENTS: COMMERCIAL ENTERTAINMENT USES IN CONJUNCTION WITH FULL SERVICE RESTAURANTS (RC-Apr 26/16;E-Jun 25/16) Commercial Entertainment Uses in conjunction with Full Service Restaurants, not exceeding 139 square metres (1,500 square feet) devoted to public use, shall only be permitted in the following locations. • 1345 Hammonds Plains Road (PID 00421131)

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any C-2 (General Business) Zone except for the

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: No development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the following:
content_blocks.text: Minimum Lot Area 29,064 square feet (2700 m2) Minimum Frontage 100 feet (30.5 m) Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 30 feet (9.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 15 feet (4.6 m) Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m)

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 16.3 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: PARKING AND OUTDOOR DISPLAY
In any C-2 Zone, the following shall apply:
content_blocks.text: (a) No open storage or outdoor display shall be permitted. (b) No parking shall be permitted within any required side or rear yard where the required yard abuts any residential or community use, except where a visual barrier is erected, in which case there will be no parking within (five) 5 feet of the side or rear lot line. (c) The parking lot shall be demarcated and paved or otherwise maintained with a stable surface which is treated in a manner to prevent the raising of dust and loose particles.
Notwithstanding the provisions of Section 16.2, where any commercial use abuts another commercial or an industrial use, the abutting side or rear yard requirement may be reduced to eight (8) feet.

The gross floor area of all commercial buildings on a lot in any C-2 Zone shall not exceed five thousand (5000) square feet of gross floor area, including any floor area devoted to permitted dwelling units.
Where institutional uses are permitted ln any C -2 Zone, the provisions of Part 22 shall apply.

content_blocks.heading_context_raw: 16.7 OTHER REQUIREMENTS: COMMERCIAL ENTERTAINMENT USES IN

content_blocks.text: (RC-Apr 26/16;E-Jun 25/16) Commercial Entertainment Uses in conjunction with Full Service Restaurants, not exceeding 139 square metres (1,500 square feet) devoted to public use, shall only be permitted in the following locations. • 1345 Hammonds Plains Road (PID 00421131)
